rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type contracts in component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use valid component ports in contracts when they are visible in the current scope
Ground all AGREE variables in the current model or explicit declarations
generic_rules: Insert annex blocks at the appropriate scope level
Ensure all identifiers in contracts are grounded in the current model
Preserve existing architecture when modifying models
Use valid visible identifiers in contracts
Place implementation-specific contracts in implementation scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Place assumptions and guarantees in the correct scope
Ground all AGREE variables in the current model
Use valid visible identifiers in contracts
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not place subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not use undeclared identifiers in contracts
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
